title: Company Driver (1 year renewable contract)
description:
* Monday - Friday, 8.30am - 5.30am

* Location: Harbourfront

* Basic + OT + Flexi benefits + Completion bonus

* Yearly renewable contract

Our Client is a European MNC in the Automotive Industry

Responsibilities:

  • Engagement of temp driver during the period inclusive of dealer/importer visits, management attending events and media or car launch events that require showcase of VIP luxury drive. 

  • Driving to Malaysia for our events which are not accessible by flight.

  • Assist fleet management in transfer of company cars for launch, events, motorshows, dealerships.

  • Maximize time efficiency when overseas VIP or AG senior management for short but intense programs.

  • Chauffeur Top Management as assigned.

  • Ensure the main MD vehicle is well maintained and clean at all times.

  • Upkeep of the MD & other assigned vehicles, including top-up petrol (or full charging for EV cars), cash-card top-up & regular maintenance servicing, switching of the cars from dealerships as assigned.

  • Driving company staff, pick up HQ guests/visitors/partners, or items for business-related events, meetings, airport transfers, errands etc as required.

  • When required, drive various company vehicles to & from dealerships (including customer test drives, repairs, maintenance, switch of cars, events etc).

  • Daily pick-up of office mails at the letterbox

  • Assisting car fleet specialist with physical submission of LTA documents for car renewal at the LTA office periodically & other tasks as assigned.

  • Upkeep proper records of Overtime details, business-related receipts

  • Follow and comply with all traffic rules and regulations.

  • Any other ad-hoc duties as assigned

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or email to submit your resume.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Stafflink Services Pte Ltd

EA Licence No.: 04C4294

EA Personnel: Jason Bong Wee Kiat

EA Personnel Reg. No.: R23116067

postedCompany.description:
STAFFLINK SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED

Stafflink Services is an enterprising human resource provider that offers a wide range of recruitment solutions for companies across all industries.

At the core of Stafflink is a team of committed and proficient recruitment consultants.  With their varies background and working experiences, clients of diverse industries can be assured of competent and personalised recruitment services that go beyond the mundane.

Here at Stafflink, we relentlessly place the interests of both clients and candidates as our top priority.  Not only do we value candidates as our key assets, we also take immense pride in servicing our clients.  By carefully understanding their needs and providing apt solutions, we strive to foster enduring relationships, all achieved with the exemplary service standard that Stafflink has set itself upon.
